zh.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos和Fernando de Caviedes至少有1個女兒。她去世於1231年在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos和Fernando de Caviedes至少有1个女儿。她去世于1231年在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Díaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Rafael, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto.
Spanish (Díaz): patronymic from the medieval personal name Didacus (see Diego ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Diazdeleon
meanings: Spanish: combination of the surname Díaz (see Diaz ) and the name León (see Leon ) with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Diego
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Francisco, Juan, Fernando, Jose, Miguel, Mario, Maximo, Salvador, Aida, Ana, Domingo.

Spanish: from the very common male personal name Diego, which in the Spanish-speaking world is usually taken to be a shortened form of Santiago . However, this may be only a folk etymology. The personal name is found in the Middle Ages in the Latin forms Didacus and Didagus, probably a derivative of Greek didachē ‘doctrine, teaching’. However, in view of the fact that this personal name is unknown outside the Iberian Peninsula, it may actually have a pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Diez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Fernando, Pedro, Rafael, Roberto, Angel, Eduardo, Mario, Ricardo.
Spanish (Díez): variant of Díaz (see Diaz ).
German: variant of   Dietz  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceballos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

variants.name: Ceballo
meanings: Spanish (mainly southern): probably an altered form (singular) of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Cevallos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos had at least 1 daughter with Fernando de Caviedes. She died in 1231, in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos a eu au moins 1 fille avec Fernando de Caviedes. Elle est décédée en 1231, à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos hatte mit Fernando de Caviedes mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1231 in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Fernando de Caviedes. Morì nel 1231, nel Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: María Díaz de CeballosはFernando de Caviedesとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1231年にスペインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos(은)는 Fernando de Caviedes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1231년 스페인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos teve pelo menos 1 filha com Fernando de Caviedes. Ela faleceu em 1231, em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: У María Díaz de Ceballos была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Fernando de Caviedes. Она умерла в 1231 г. в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: María Díaz de Ceballos tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Fernando de Caviedes. Murió en 1231, en España.
